The family Cyperaceae is further divided into several subfamilies and tribes, with Abildgaardia macrantha being part of the subfamily Cyperoideae. This classification places Abildgaardia macrantha within the monocot clade of flowering plants. The classification of Abildgaardia macrantha reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the sedge family.
